message:
fix(database/mysql): reopen connection on OK packet parse error in execute()

The execute() method marked connection closed=true before I/O for
cancel-safety, but the OK packet (0x00) parse error path did not
restore closed=false despite the protocol exchange being complete.
This caused unnecessary connection pool churn on malformed OK payloads.

Also records 27-file fresh-eyes audit (batch piwhi5) in audit_index.jsonl
covering HEAD~50 changes: kafka_consumer, nats, redis, fabric, gen_server,
supervision, HTTP stack, database clients, and more - all SOUND except
this one fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
